Official Announcement  ·  2026

LIBERTY TRUST

For American Strength  ·  47th President of the United States

$TRUST is a landmark project for American Blockchain Enthusiasts, launched in commemoration of the 2026 United States Mid-Term Election. Born from the enduring values of transparency, sovereignty, and civic duty — it represents a new frontier in digital patriotism.

"You supported us in 2024. We will continue to support and serve the American people."

— Donald J. Trump, 47th President of the United States of America

$TRUST stands at the convergence of patriotic conviction and technological innovation — a monument to the freedoms that define the American republic, now carried forward on the blockchain.

Frequently Asked Questions

01

What is $TRUST?

SHOW

$TRUST is a community-driven project for American Blockchain Enthusiasts, launched in commemoration of the 2026 United States Mid-Term Election. Built on the values of transparency, sovereignty, and civic duty.

02

How do I buy $TRUST?

SHOW

You can purchase $TRUST with a debit card or with crypto using the official links on this page. Always verify the contract address before purchasing.

03

What blockchain is $TRUST on?

SHOW

$TRUST is built on the Solana blockchain, known for its fast transactions and low fees. Always verify the official contract address listed on this page.

04

Is $TRUST an investment?

SHOW

$TRUST is not intended to be an investment opportunity, investment contract, or security of any type. It is an expression of support for the ideals embodied by the symbol "$TRUST". Always do your own research.

05

Is this affiliated with Donald Trump or his campaign?

SHOW

TrumpVote24.com is not political and has nothing to do with any political campaign or governmental agency. This product is not distributed or sold by Donald J. Trump, The Trump Organization or any of their respective affiliates or principals.
